name: How long do I have to file a back injury claim after work accident in Boise?
description: 60 days to report, 1 year to file in Idaho—notify employer now.

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a back injury claim after work accident in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: 60 days to report, 1 year to file in Idaho—notify employer now.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Report within 60 days to your employer; file formal claim within 1 year in Idaho.**

Timely reporting prevents denial; statutes are strict.[2] Back injuries often worsen later, but delays risk losing benefits.

- Notify supervisor ASAP, in writing.
- File with Idaho Industrial Commission by 1-year mark.
- Track all medical visits.

Act fast to avoid bars; an attorney can preserve deadlines amid complications.[2] Don't wait for full symptoms.
